chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Misc. Application No.S-09 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 13.11.2025 Mr. Mazhar Ali Sial, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. = The applicant is complainant in F.I.R No.86/2024, for offence under sections 365-B, 365 and 34 P.P.C and section 3 TIP Act, 2018 of PS Nangarparkar. The applicant has challenged the bail granting order of respondent No.1 Khamiso who was admitted on bail by learned Sessions Judge, Tharparkar at Mithi vide order dated 11.01.2025. Admittedly, the grant of bail and its cancellation are entirely different and Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan has settled principal for cancellation of bail in cases reported in PLD 1977 SC 57 and 2023 SCMR 1397 whereby the criteria has been fixed for cancellation of bail. I do not see any illegality in the impugned order which has been passed in accordance with law. No case for cancellation of bail is made out, therefore, the instant Crl. Misc. Application stands dismissed. JUDGE *Faisal*
